channel.title: Dotnettips.wordpress.com on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Dotnettips.wordpress.com on .NET Ramblings

item.title: IO Performance: Reuse HttpClient to Avoid Connection Overhead
item.description: When populating collections in .NET, choosing the right bulk operation improves both clarity and efficiency. Methods like AddRange() and InsertRange() allow multiple items to be added in a single call, reducing overhead compared to repeated individual inserts and clearly expressing intent. When combined with proper capacity planning, these approaches help produce predictable, maintainable code—whether items are being appended or inserted at a specific position. Link to article: https://dotnettips.com/2026/06/28/io-performance-reuse-httpclient-to-avoid-connection-overhead/

item.title: dotNetDave Rocks .NET Day Switzerland 2026
item.description: dotNetDave will be speaking at SQL Saturday in Austin, Texas, on June 27, 2026, as part of the No Rest for the Wicked World Tour. His sessions, "Röck Yoür Cäreer" and "Unleash Your Inner Rockstar," focus on valuable career insights for tech professionals and strategies for dynamic public speaking, promising actionable guidance and inspiration. Link to article: https://dotnettips.com/2026/06/26/dotnetdave-rocks-net-day-switzerland-2026/

item.title: Database Performance: Making Entity Framework Queries Faster
item.description: The article discusses the advantages of using compiled queries in Entity Framework, especially for frequently executed and complex queries. Link to article: https://dotnettips.com/2026/06/21/database-performance-making-entity-framework-queries-faster/
